_meta.notes: Hand-reconstructed (NOT logging-shim captured). Shape derived from task_create_production_shape.json (#612 logging-shim capture); only task id/subject/description/owner were re-parameterized for the parallel-batch scenario. capture_method='synthesized' indicates the fixture may be lossy relative to a live production payload; capture_method='logging-shim' (used by task_create_production_shape.json) indicates a lossless captured shape. TaskCreate PostToolUse stdin for the FIRST task in a parallel-batch fire. The companion fixture task_create_parallel_burst_second.json represents the second fire in the same batch. Both task files (id 10 and id 11) are pre-written to the team tasks dir before the hook is invoked, simulating the race window where both files land before either PostToolUse hook reads the filesystem. Under the strict-equality predicate (count == 1) both fires reject and Arm is never emitted; under the positive-bound predicate (count >= 1) both fires emit Arm and start-pending-scan's CronList idempotency absorbs the redundant emit.

tool_input.subject: First task in parallel-batch dispatch
tool_input.description: Initial task in a parallel TaskCreate batch.
